name: @dna/sdk
description: DNA — Domain Notation of Anything (TypeScript SDK)
//peerDependencies: OPTIONAL opt-in extras, never in the default bundle: (1) rec-embedding-port — the REAL EmbeddingPort (ONNX all-MiniLM-L6-v2 via transformers.js), dynamic-imported by OnnxEmbeddingProvider only on first embed() (guard: tests/embedding-import-isolation.test.ts); (2) rec-embeddable-provider — sqlite-vec, the loadable extension for SqliteVecRecordSearchProvider, dynamic-imported by src/adapters/search/driver.ts (guard: tests/search-import-isolation.test.ts). It IS a devDependency too so `bun test` runs the search provider conformance for real, offline. Under Bun on macOS set DNA_SQLITE_LIB to a libsqlite3 that permits extension loading (e.g. Homebrew's).
